prompt: I just cloned the UltrERP repo and opened a fresh Claude Code session. I want to set up the ERP for the first time. Run /setup to check what needs to be done.

assertions.text: Skill runs check-db and reports database connectivity status
Skill runs check-alembic and reports current Alembic revision
Skill runs check-tables and reports which tables exist
Skill runs check-users and reports user count
Skill presents a checklist of missing vs. present components
Skill does NOT run any write actions (migrations, seed, create-admin) without operator confirmation
